prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Lighting controls & emergency egress, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: exit sign dead battery (test-button item). The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: NEC 700, NFPA 101.
title: Fault diagnosis: Lighting controls & emergency egress (commercial project)
